posts.title: Honesty is the best Policy. The Secret Wars on the use of AI on DEV
posts.content:
I wasn't planning on writing the post about it anytime soon until seeing that article. Time to time, I have seen people use AI to write their articles and seeing that it gets more engagement than actually writing it.I wasn't planning on writing the post about it anytime soon until seeing that article.
